org.key_project.util.collection

Class ImmutableLeftistHeap.Node<S extends Comparable<S>>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.key_project.util.collection.ImmutableLeftistHeap<S>
      • org.key_project.util.collection.ImmutableLeftistHeap.Node<S>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Iterable<S>, ImmutableHeap<S>
    Enclosing class:
    ImmutableLeftistHeap<T extends Comparable<T>>

    private static class ImmutableLeftistHeap.Node<S extends Comparable<S>>
extends ImmutableLeftistHeap<S>
    Class for non-empty heaps

      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private S data 
      private ImmutableLeftistHeap<S> left
      Children of the root of this heap
      private ImmutableLeftistHeap<S> right 
      private int rightHeight
      Length of the right spine, i.e. the length of the path from the root to rightmost leaf
      private static long serialVersionUID 
      private int size

      • getRightHeight

        protected int getRightHeight()
        Length of the right spine, i.e. the length of the path from the root to rightmost leaf
        Specified by:
        getRightHeight in class ImmutableLeftistHeap<S extends Comparable<S>>

      • isEmpty

        public boolean isEmpty()
        Returns:
        true iff this heap is empty

      • insert

        public ImmutableHeap<S> insert(S element)
        Add an element to this heap object
        Parameters:
        element - the element to be added
        Returns:
        a heap that contains all elements of this heap, and additionally element

      • insert

        public ImmutableHeap<S> insert(ImmutableHeap<S> h)
        Add multiple elements to this heap object
        Parameters:
        h - a heap containing the elements to be added
        Returns:
        a heap that contains all elements of this heap, and additionally all objects from h

      • findMin

        public S findMin()
        Returns:
        the minimum element of this heap, or null iff this heap is empty (isEmpty()==true)

      • deleteMin

        public ImmutableHeap<S> deleteMin()
        Remove the minimum element from this heap
        Returns:
        a heap that contains all elements of this heap except for the minimum element

      • removeAll

        public ImmutableHeap<S> removeAll(S element)
        Remove all elements of this heap which are equal to element.
        Returns:
        heap that has all occurrences of element removed

      • size

        public int size()
        Returns:
        the number of elements this heap holds
